pricing.subtitle: Get immediate help with our fixed rates, no surprises
pricing.expatDescription: Get practical advice from an experienced expat in your destination country.
pricing.lawyerDescription: Consult a qualified lawyer for all your legal questions related to expatriation.
pricing.securePaymentDesc: All your transactions are protected by 256-bit SSL encryption. We never store your credit card data.
pricing.satisfactionGuaranteeDesc: If the expert doesn't answer after 3 attempts, you are automatically refunded. We guarantee 100% satisfaction.
pricing.faq.payment.question: How does payment work?
pricing.faq.payment.answer: Payment is made online securely via Stripe. You are only charged after your call is confirmed.
pricing.faq.availability.question: What happens if the expert is not available?
pricing.faq.availability.answer: If the expert doesn't answer after 3 attempts, you are automatically refunded and can choose another profile.
pricing.faq.invoice.question: Can I get an invoice?
pricing.faq.invoice.answer: Yes, you automatically receive a PDF invoice after each call, downloadable from your dashboard.
testimonials.meta.title: Customer Reviews SOS Expats | 2347+ Verified Testimonials
testimonials.meta.description: Discover authentic reviews from our expat clients in 150+ countries. Average rating of 4.9/5 stars. Verified testimonials from consultations with lawyers and expats.
testimonials.hero.title: Our clients testimonials
testimonials.hero.subtitle: Discover authentic experiences from our users worldwide. Every testimonial is verified and represents a real story of help provided.
testimonials.noResultsDescription: Try changing your filters or search
testimonials.cta.title: Ready to get help?
testimonials.cta.description: Join over 15,000 expats who trust us for their procedures abroad.
testimonials.review.1.comment: I needed urgent help for a visa issue in Thailand. Within 5 minutes, I was connected with a French expat who knows the local system perfectly. He gave me practical advice and directed me to the right procedures. Exceptional service!
testimonials.review.2.comment: Complicated move to Portugal. The expat helped me understand the tax system, opening a bank account, and even the best schools for my kids. Really useful!
testimonials.review.3.comment: Employment contract in Germany: the lawyer analyzed all clauses in detail and advised me on points to renegotiate. Investment that saved me thousands of euros in the long run.
testimonials.review.4.comment: Work permit in Canada: thanks to the expat's advice, I avoided several mistakes that could have delayed my application by months. Very professional.
testimonials.review.5.comment: Dispute with my landlord in Spain. The lawyer clearly explained my rights and gave me legal arguments to negotiate. Problem solved in 2 weeks!
testimonials.review.6.comment: Moving to Australia: the expat shared experience about neighborhoods, health insurance, and even local deals. Huge time saver!
testimonials.review.7.comment: Starting a business in Japan: the expat knew the specific administrative procedures perfectly. He helped me avoid numerous bureaucratic pitfalls.
testimonials.review.8.comment: Tax issue in Mexico: the specialized lawyer helped me understand my obligations and regularize my situation. Fast and efficient service.
testimonials.review.9.comment: Real estate investment in Brazil: the expat's advice on the local market and pitfalls to avoid was invaluable. Highly recommend!
testimonials.review.10.comment: Complex international divorce. The lawyer guided me through all legal procedures in two different countries. Exemplary professionalism.
testimonials.review.11.comment: Car accident in UAE: the lawyer clearly explained my rights and insurance procedures. Everything resolved much faster than expected.
testimonials.review.12.comment: Job search in UK: the expat helped me adapt my CV to the local market and gave me interview tips. Found a position in 3 weeks!
testimonials.review.13.comment: Children's schooling in Italy: the expat explained the entire Italian school system and recommended the best bilingual schools. Super helpful for a family move.
testimonials.review.14.comment: Customs issue in Morocco: the expat knew the procedures perfectly and helped me avoid significant additional fees.
testimonials.review.15.comment: Entrepreneur visa to USA: the immigration lawyer helped me prepare a solid application. Visa obtained on first try!
testimonials.review.16.comment: Moving to Vietnam: the expat gave me all practical advice on housing, transport, and daily life. Much easier transition thanks to him!
